market.summary: The global art market continues its resilience in the 2026 session, with strong momentum observed at Art Basel Hong Kong. Modern classics remain the anchor, while interest in digital art sectors is providing new growth opportunities.
keyTrends: Increased selectivity with higher sell-through rates
Historical categories and Modern art segment outperforming Contemporary
Significant long-term growth in the secondary market for women artists
Global art market stabilization at $59.6 billion
Growing collector interest in digital art integration at major fairs

highlights: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026: Morning collector traffic steady with digital art sector rising
Vivian Maier collection (206 prints) reaching secondary market peak on March 26
Global stocks show mixed performance with modest 2026 gains in major indices
Oil price fluctuations impacting energy sector stocks
Upcoming Q4 earnings for Stran & Company (SWAG)
